---
title: "MATH 341"
subtitle: "Fall 2026"
jupyter: diffeq_py
license: "CC BY-NC-SA 4.0"
---

## Instructor Information

::: {layout="[30,70]"}

![JMG](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/0zg0j0n394jj8hrsyjqcb/IMG_0571.jpeg?rlkey=oubphrcdet6otvy1n4e8ksplk&raw=1){fig-alt="Photograph of the instructor Jason M. Graham."}

* **Instructor:** [Jason M. Graham](https://sites.google.com/site/jasonmgrahamus/)

* **Office Location:** LSC 319A 
    
* **Office Hours for Students:**  

:::

* **Email:** <jason.graham@scranton.edu>

* **Phone:** (570) 941-7491

* **Course Page:** [https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/](https://math341diffeq.netlify.app/)


## Course Materials

### Required Course Materials

::: {layout="[70,30]"}

* [*A First Course in Differential Equations, 3rd Ed.*](https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-3-319-17852-3) by [J. David Logan](https://www.math.unl.edu/~jlogan1/), ISBN: 978-3-319-17852-3

* *A First Course in Differential Equations* covers the basic topics in post-calculus differential equations. It is written for students in engineering, biosciences, physics, economics, and mathematics and emphasizes applications in those areas.  Electronic access to *A First Course in Differential Equations* is available through the [Weinberg Memorial Library](https://www.scranton.edu/academics/wml/index.shtml). [Access the book](https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-3-319-17852-3).

![Required Textbook](https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61EFNhQvejL._AC_UF1000,1000_QL80_.jpg){fig-alt="Front cover of the textbook." width=170}

:::
